Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. An unsolicited guide to being a researcher [pdf] 95 upvotes, 12 comments
  2. POSSE – Publish on your Own Site, Syndicate Elsewhere 352 upvotes, 76 comments
  3. Can you get root with only a cigarette lighter? (2024) 146 upvotes, 30 comments
  4. The gold standard of optimization: A look under the hood of RollerCoaster Tycoon 512 upvotes, 138 comments
  5. Side-Effectful Expressions in C (2023) 11 upvotes, 0 comments
  6. Project Nomad – Knowledge That Never Goes Offline 547 upvotes, 203 comments
  7. The way CTRL-C in Postgres CLI cancels queries is incredibly hack-y 113 upvotes, 36 comments
  8. PC Gamer recommends RSS readers in a 37mb article that just keeps downloading 764 upvotes, 351 comments
  9. Bombadil: Property-based testing for web UIs 161 upvotes, 64 comments
  10. “Collaboration” is bullshit 145 upvotes, 65 comments
  11. Nanopositioning Metrology, Gödel, and Bootstraps 13 upvotes, 2 comments
  12. GitHub appears to be struggling with measly three nines availability 330 upvotes, 176 comments
  13. The future of version control 615 upvotes, 346 comments
  14. iPhone 17 Pro Demonstrated Running a 400B LLM 179 upvotes, 102 comments
  15. If DSPy is so great, why isn't anyone using it? 133 upvotes, 79 comments
  16. Why I love NixOS 403 upvotes, 273 comments
  17. Reports of code's death are greatly exaggerated 524 upvotes, 387 comments
  18. Walmart: ChatGPT checkout converted 3x worse than website 280 upvotes, 197 comments
  19. Study: 'Security Fatigue' May Weaken Digital Defenses 67 upvotes, 40 comments
  20. Migrating to the EU 643 upvotes, 525 comments
  21. Tin Can, a 'landline' for kids 268 upvotes, 214 comments
  22. Is it a pint? 78 upvotes, 73 comments
  23. Trivy under attack again: Widespread GitHub Actions tag compromise secrets 9 upvotes, 4 comments
  24. Show HN: Threadprocs – executables sharing one address space (0-copy pointers) 24 upvotes, 18 comments
  25. Cyber.mil serving file downloads using TLS certificate which expired 3 days ago 73 upvotes, 74 comments
  26. General Motors is assisting with the restoration of a rare EV1 59 upvotes, 64 comments
  27. Cyberattack on vehicle breathalyzer company leaves drivers stranded in the US 85 upvotes, 99 comments
  28. I built an AI receptionist for a mechanic shop 62 upvotes, 81 comments
  29. Two pilots dead after plane and ground vehicle collide at LaGuardia 90 upvotes, 143 comments
  30. GoGoGrandparent (YC S16) is hiring Back end Engineers 0 upvotes, 0 comments

Last generated 1:30am, 24 March 2026. Source here.
